info.title: WSF API
info.description: Woven Sovereignty Fabric trust-plane API: trust tokens, sealed envelopes, cloud-credential brokering, and the receipt ledger. All signatures are ML-DSA-87 and verify off-host.

post.summary: Issue a signed trust token from the authenticated principal and tenant policy. The body carries bounded intent only: requested roles, models, and budget.

403.description: Principal, tenant policy, role, model, or budget denied.

422.description: Malformed bounded-intent request or an unknown authority field.

post.summary: Verify a token's signature, revocation status, and expiry.
Mint a child from an authenticated parent and narrowing restrictions only. Signature, expiry, current revocation, tenant, lineage, and every authority axis fail closed.

403.description: Principal, tenant, or current revocation denied.

422.description: Parent authentication failed or a restriction widens authority.

post.summary: Seal a payload into an envelope (Transit-wrapped data key + provenance thread).
Unseal an envelope for a token-authorized op.
Exchange a verified token through a tenant-scoped named grant. The server resolves the cloud identity and scope; callers never supply a raw role ARN, service account, or provider scope.

403.description: Token, tenant, current revocation, or named grant denied.

422.description: Malformed request or a caller-supplied cloud-authority field.

get.summary: Query the receipt ledger by correlation field/value. Results are tenant-scoped to the authenticated principal; only an explicitly enrolled global auditor reads across tenants.

200.description: Matching tenant-scoped entries, or cross-tenant entries for an enrolled global auditor.

get.summary: Export the ML-DSA-signed evidence pack over the full ledger (global auditors only; verifies offline).

403.description: Principal is not an enrolled global auditor.
